method: PYTHONPATH shadow (throwaway git worktrees under /tmp/pt-verify-wt, prebuilt HEAD .so + generated artifacts symlinked in; every branch base..tip diff is pure-python) over torch 2.13.0a0 on B200. BASE arm = bare 5e2ab3055de shadow; BRANCH arm = PR branch tip shadow. Fresh TORCHINDUCTOR_CACHE_DIR per arm. All timing via scripts/bench_parallel.py (locked GPU path, clock lock 1852MHz, --no-cd, min-of-rounds do_bench). Same repro set both arms; branch arms repeated (run2) - repeats matched to <0.1%, so within-session noise is far below the cross-session 8% p95 floor. Arm separation proven by: output _metadata.pytorch_commit per arm, base cache emits 0 rsqrt kernels vs 56 on the rsqrt arm, and base SoftmaxForward ~3657us (matches the documented ~3541us pre-fix level).

pr/rsqrt-clean.repro_set_note: The task-suggested var_mean_5a22dd21d88e / var_mean_42fad1ece813 already contain aten.rsqrt in their captured graphs (pass cannot fire; commit-walk showed ~1.00x on them), so the actually affected reciprocal(sqrt) family from the walk's own top-improvements list was benched instead.
pr/rsqrt-clean.expected: order 2x on affected kernels (walk: 2.1-2.6x on this family)

measured.walk_agreement: point-for-point match with the a73d1583b34 commit-walk deltas (e.g. repvgg 2.59x walk vs 2.61x here)

pr/rsqrt-clean.feature_proof: base cache: 0 kernels emit rsqrt; branch cache: 56 kernels emit libdevice.rsqrt/tl.rsqrt

pr/ce-hoist-clean.expected: a real improvement from the hoist (original claim +1.22pp kernel-geomean, measured mega->hoist in the walk)
pr/ce-hoist-clean.root_cause: On clean base 5e2ab the CE gather is ALREADY hoisted: base lowers the genai CE graph to a single fused prepare_softmax_online kernel with the target-logit gather outside the reduction loop, and the branch's generated kernel code is byte-identical to base's (verified by diff of the generated .py, modulo cache paths). On the corpus CE repros the pass DOES fire (graph rewritten to cross_entropy_loss_online; kernel names change) but timing is exactly parity. The original +1.22pp was measured relative to the mega-commit state 97385fb3273, whose Path-A in-loop CE reduction had REGRESSED these kernels (walk: DistillGPT2 1246.8 pre-mega -> 3670.8 mega -> 1329.1 post-hoist); ab29345 fixed the mega's regression rather than beating pre-mega base. Standalone on clean base it is perf-neutral on every targeted bench.
pr/ce-hoist-clean.verdict: FAILS (perf-neutral vs clean base; the claimed gain was relative to the mega-commit's regressed state, which this carved branch does not include)
pr/ce-hoist-clean.prereq_only_note: A prereq-only arm (1cca4ca8347 alone, Path A) FAILS to compile the corpus CE repros (NotImplementedError: online_softmax_cross_entropy combine not used directly), i.e. within the carved branch the ab29345 Path-B commit is required for the prereq's CE path to function at all. The two commits are a valid unit but their combined perf contribution vs clean base is zero.

pr/online-softmax-clean.repro_set_note: the commit's own named repro amax_sum_sum_6fd07d12d98a no longer exists in the corpus (renamed/GC'd); nearest family members benched
pr/online-softmax-clean.flag_default: online_softmax_fast_combine default ON in the branch (env-gated, '1')
pr/online-softmax-clean.expected: named repro ~29% faster (gap 1.42x->1.01x); walk showed 1.36x/1.28x on 04ddf882ff17/3f000d9caa57 vs the mega-lineage pre-state

flag_isolation.note: branch-with-flag-OFF vs base: prereq scaffolding alone regresses amax_sum_sum 0.90-0.92x but wins 1.72x on 02064a; flag ON vs OFF recovers 1.14-1.22x on every point

pr/online-softmax-clean.verdict: REPRODUCES (directionally): real 1.03-1.96x wins vs base, geomean 1.23x on the affected family; the fast-combine flag itself delivers a consistent 1.14-1.22x. Exact named-repro claim not checkable (repro gone). Caveat: the carried prereq scaffolding alone costs 8-10% on some amax_sum_sum points, which the flag more than recovers - net positive on every benched point.

pr/scalar-acc-clean.note: base arm at 3657us confirms the pre-fix level (~3541 claimed); branch 2030us vs claimed 1905us - same magnitude, slightly less in absolute (different session/clock bin), ratio 1.80x vs claimed 1.86x

overall.pr/ce-hoist-clean: FAILS (perf-neutral vs base on all targeted benches)
overall.pr/online-softmax-clean: REPRODUCES (directionally; named repro gone; net-positive everywhere benched)

provenance.artifacts: /tmp/scratch_space/pr_perf_verify/ (raw bench JSONs, logs, per-arm caches, compare.py, run_all.sh)
